comments.LineComment: | ColorPreview — Unified color output display with all formats.
| Shows the currently selected color in multiple representations:
| All values are displayed simultaneously for easy copying/reference.

value.value: linear-gradient(45deg, #ccc 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, #ccc 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, #ccc 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, #ccc 75%)
